caption: A news broadcast from News18 India reports on political tensions in Bihar. The screen features a graphic backdrop showing a map of "बिहार" (Bihar) with a lightning bolt striking it, overlaid with the text "JDU को धमकी". Three men are pictured: Nitish Kumar, identified as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", wearing a white kurta; and two others on the right, "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी", both in white attire. A prominent orange "BREAKING" banner runs across the bottom, and the time "10:04 PM" is displayed. The top headline changes between frames, shifting from "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" to "कांग्रेस चटपटा तेज़" and then "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". The layout remains consistent across the sequence, with the stationary images of the politicians and the map while only the top headline text updates to provide further commentary on the news story.
